# SBDC Government Procurement and UH APEX Routing Process

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## BOSS government-contracting sequence 1. If the user is only thinking about starting a business, keep SBDC primary and focus on validation, operations, and readiness. 2. If the user is newly selling but has little track record, use Government Jumpstation to educate them by stage.

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns accounting, certification, formation during Validation, Formation, Operations and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- ## BOSS government-contracting sequence
- If the user is only thinking about starting a business, keep SBDC primary and focus on validation, operations, and readiness.
- If the user is newly selling but has little track record, use Government Jumpstation to educate them by stage.
- If the user is an existing for-profit business with a legally formed entity, products/services it can actually sell, and relevant experience/capacity, consider UH APEX Accelerator.
- Use APEX for registrations, certifications education, market research, bid/no-bid review, solicitation guidance, and government accounting system education.
- ## Guardrails
- Do not guarantee certification, contracts, awards, loan approval, or eligibility. Do not fill out procurement forms for the user. Route to official resources and advisors.

## People and links

- Organizations: Small Business Development Center (SBDC), APEX Accelerator, University of Houston
- Link: <https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Programs.asp>

## Next handoff

Open the cited source link when available and route follow-up to Small Business Development Center (SBDC) or the named qualified resource.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
